title: thelypteris costularisora
intro: Thelypteris costularisora, also known as the Costularisora Lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Thelypteris costularisora include the potential treatment of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
